title: lantana microphylla
intro: Lantana microphylla is a flowering shrub species belonging to the verbena family, known for its small, delicate flowers and aromatic foliage. The plant is rich in medicinal properties, particularly its essential oil, which is known for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Lantana microphylla include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its ability to act as an antiseptic and antifungal agent. Lantana microphylla can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used in traditional medicine to harness its medicinal properties.
